devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout Program
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints including pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection Implementation
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP and deploy agents to 143 workloads.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure and deploy Splunk with prioritized log ingestion.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance Enforcement
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices with policy enforcement.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard required security roles.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Commercial & Legal Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete commercial, financial and legal procurement cycle for Splunk.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Commercial & Licensing Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete vendor selection and procurement cycle for MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Management
devsecEpics.desc: Ensure structured governance for all security tool purchases.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment for Critical Domains
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune WAF protection for critical domains.

devsecEpics.name: Remove Non-Critical Apps from Public Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce external attack surface across all brands by removing non-critical apps.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Active Infections & Anomalies
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigation across multi-cloud environment.

devsecEpics.name: K8s Security Posture Review (GKE & AWS Clusters)
devsecEpics.desc: Perform comprehensive Kubernetes Security Posture Management review for all clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration Security Review of New EKS Cluster
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of new AWS EKS cluster post migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design K8s Cluster Segregation Strategy
devsecEpics.desc: Design architecture for segregating workloads into multiple clusters to reduce blast radius.
